title: Medieval Adventure Pack
description: A modpack for a server project fitting a medieval fantasy rp smp modpack. This is for easy updating
body:
A modpack made for a medieval fantasy/adventure rp smp project, but works very well as a singleplayer adventure modpack. With many useful mods and fun features. It's best run with over 9gb ram set in the settings for the best experience to run, so it's not made for low-end pcs. And use Java 21.

Make sure to change the fabric version to the newest version whenever the mods need it. And keep mods (except Axiom and Contractor (don't use 3.0.0 alpha) for now) up to date.

Also, the pack features a custom fixed version of numismatic to work with the better ocean temple mod.

To partake in the building for the potential server world, join the discord and add Essential (so far the only one that has worked without issue) to the pack.


Upcoming plans: A lite version removing all client side mods for those wanting to take part in the building project and server without too much stress on their machines
